steps.title: Set up equations from the given conditions
steps.content:
Let $S$ = September sales and $A$ = August sales.

From August completed 15 more than 3 times September:
$$A = 3S + 15$$
From August and September totaled 363 sales:
$$A + S = 363$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve for September sales
steps.content:
Substitute $A = 3S + 15$ into $A + S = 363$:
$$(3S + 15) + S = 363$$
$$4S + 15 = 363$$
$$4S = 348$$
$$S = 87$$
Verify: August $= 3(87) + 15 = 276$, and $276 + 87 = 363$ ✓

The car dealer completed 87 sales in September.
